name: dev-loop
description: Four autonomous agents — PM, QA, Dev, and Sweep — that run a software-development loop coordinated entirely through Linear ticket state. PM proposes and verifies features from a strategy doc; QA hunts and re-tests bugs; Dev pulls Todo tickets in priority order, implements, self-reviews, ships, and smoke-checks prod (auto-revert on a break); Sweep is a lifecycle janitor that fixes tickets falling through the cracks (missing/wrong owner labels, orphaned In Progress). Every ticket the system touches carries a `dev-loop` label so it never disturbs the human backlog.
